description: Simmons escapes from Hydra’s custody inside the castle, frantically hiding from her pursuers. She discovers the Inhuman storage containers and S.H.I.E.L.D.’s own containment unit, where Andrew Garner pleads for release, promising to protect her from Hydra. With Hydra closing in, Simmons releases Andrew, who transforms and begins slaughtering their captors, giving Simmons a chance to hide and survive.
location: English castle (site of the monolith / Distant Star Pathfinder facility)
